name: Hollow Giants
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍馬躓図</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅうめつまずきのず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Illustration of a Stumbling Dragon Horse
desc: Activate this card only if both players control a monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. Negate the effects of face-up monsters Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. If a monster(s) is destroyed by battle involving 2 monsters that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: Send this card to the GY, also the player(s) who controlled the destroyed monster(s) takes 1000 damage.
eff: Activate this card only if both players control a monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. Negate the effects of face-up monsters Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. If a monster(s) is destroyed by battle involving 2 monsters that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: Send this card to the GY, also the player(s) who controlled the destroyed monster(s) takes 1000 damage.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
